decision.rationale: The plate at motion_plates/head-turn-08.png honors the identity rule IR.sean.motion.head-turn-9-frame-sequence. As the eighth frame of the nine-frame sequence, it represents an intermediate rotation where the head is turned at approximately 75% towards the right target. It successfully demonstrates the required eye-lead timing: the eyes are open and their gaze has fully shifted to the right, anticipation-style, 1 frame before the head reaches the final anchor-grade profile-right pose in frame 09. The hair silhouette is consistent, maintaining the tousled structure with the center cowlick, and any back-of-skull silhouette variations fall within the minor intermediate drift permitted by the rule.
